name: Chicony Power Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chicony Power Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures and sells switching power supplies, electronic components, LED lighting modules, and smart building solutions in Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. Its power supply products include adapters and power products used in the area of server, storage, telecom, desk-top, gaming, ATM, open frame, and industry power. The company offers LED lamps, tubes, and indoor and outdoor LED luminaires and drivers. It also manufactures and sells transformers and plastic products. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
